结节病.authors: Meskini M, Aspatwar A
结节病.summary: 结核病的药物开发需考虑患者合并的慢性疾病（如糖尿病、HIV等）对宿主免疫和药物疗效的影响，而非仅依赖健康模型。

结节病.title: Association Between Type I Interferonopathies and the Development of Cutaneous Sarcoidosis, Morphea, Lichen Planus and Granuloma Annulare: A Retrospective Cohort Study.
结节病.authors: Block B, Mehta J, Soto-Canetti G, Tang A, Spingler R, Ungar B, Talia J
结节病.summary: I型干扰素病显著增加皮肤结节病、硬斑病、扁平苔藓和环状肉芽肿的发病风险。

ILD.title: Osimertinib plus datopotamab deruxtecan in patients with EGFR-mutated advanced NSCLC after progression on first-line osimertinib: ORCHARD.
ILD.authors: Riess JW, Yu HA, Le X, de Langen AJ, Cho BC, Piotrowska Z, Hendriks LEL, Morabito A, Bonanno L, Brustugun OT, Halvorsen TO, Kim YJ, Marrone KA, Shiraishi Y, Goldman JW, Ambrose H, Smith PE, FraenkeI PG, Tang KH, Lehman JM, Goldberg SB
ILD.summary: 奥希替尼联合Dato-DXd用于一线奥希替尼进展的EGFR突变晚期NSCLC，客观缓解率36%-43%，中位无进展生存期9.5-11.7个月。

ILD.title: Interstitial lung disease and the STING pathway.
ILD.authors: Velu PP, Zhu G, Mackenzie KJ
ILD.summary: STING通路参与SAVI和COPA综合征的间质性肺病发病，但对其在常见ILD中的作用尚不清楚。

ILD.title: Nintedanib combined with dual immunosuppression for interstitial lung disease in systemic sclerosis and rheumatoid arthritis: A systematic review and pooled multicentre real-world cohort study.
ILD.authors: Chioni A, Campochiaro C, Keret S, Panopoulos S, Baresic M, Varelas G, Radic M, Sebastiani M, Tektonidou MG, Sfikakis PP, Rimar D, Matucci-Cerinic M, Daoussis D
ILD.summary: 尼达尼布联合双免疫抑制剂对系统性硬化症相关间质性肺病患者的肺功能保持稳定。

ILD.title: Izalontamab brengitecan (Iza-bren; BL-B01D1), a first-in-class EGFR-HER3 bispecific antibody-drug conjugate, for patients with EGFR-mutated NSCLC: pooled analysis of phase I and phase II trials.
ILD.authors: Hong SD, Wang YS, Zhao HY, Zhao YY, Wang QM, Ma YX, Li YS, Huang Y, Yang YP, Fu ZM, Chen LK, Zhou F, Yang J, Li XY, Hou X, Zhou NN, Sun LH, Zhang GF, Cui JW, Wu L, Chen G, Zhang YX, Wang HY, Lv DQ, Shi JH, Jiang B, Li C, Li XL, Tang KJ, Yu Y, Ji YH, He ZY, Zhu Y, Zhu H, Xiao S, Zhou CC, Zhang L, Fang WF
ILD.summary: IZA-BREN对EGFR突变NSCLC患者有效，ORR 47.4%，DCR 81.3%，安全可控。

ILD.title: Integrated machine learning risk model for predicting radiation pneumonitis in lung cancer patients with interstitial lung disease.
ILD.authors: Lu H, Jiang A, Yuan Z, Chen D
ILD.summary: 整合临床、剂量及炎症因子的机器学习列线图能准确预测肺间质病变肺癌患者的放射性肺炎风险。

ILD.title: Pulmonary toxicity of immune-checkpoint inhibitors.
ILD.authors: Mahiat C, Cadranel J, Fallet V, Meteye C, Gendarme S, Slomka J, Canellas A
ILD.summary: 免疫检查点抑制剂相关性肺炎虽少见但致命，需尽早识别和管理，尤其高风险患者。

ILD.title: Childhood Interstitial Lung Disease-Successful Application of a Stepwise Diagnostic Classification.
ILD.authors: Rapp CK, Griese M
ILD.summary: 该三步分类法对儿童间质性肺病诊断有效，遗传学诊断率达50.8%。

ILD.title: Combination therapy with mycophenolate mofetil, nintedanib, and tocilizumab in a patient with progressive systemic sclerosis-associated interstitial lung disease : A case report and a literature review.
ILD.authors: Chen L, Li X, Huang D, Chen P, Xu P, Chen H, Zhang X
ILD.summary: 霉酚酸酯、尼达尼布和托珠单抗联合治疗可有效控制进行性系统性硬化症相关间质性肺病。

ILD.title: Using Genetic Risk Scores for Rheumatoid Arthritis-Associated Interstitial Lung Disease Risk Stratification.
ILD.authors: McDermott GC, Sparks JA
ILD.summary: 摘要缺失。

ILD.title: Personalized treatment of HER2-positive lung adenocarcinoma using Human Organoid Drug Sensitivity Test.
ILD.authors: Luan T, Fu S, Liu W, Wang S, Xie X, Lin X, Chenli Z, Wang L, Ma K, Ma H, Mo J, Yu B, Yang Q, Xu Y, Jin H, Chen Q, Yao L, Luan Y, Zhong N, Lv Q, Zhang Y, Zhou C
ILD.summary: 人源性类器官药敏测试可有效指导HER2阳性肺腺癌的个体化治疗。

ILD.title: Lung-only involvement in STING-associated vasculopathy with onset in infancy: a diagnostic pitfall in the absence of cutaneous vasculitis.
ILD.authors: Kisla Ekinci RM, Cay U, Kor D, Telefon HA, Ekinci F, Horoz OO, Yildizdas D
ILD.summary: 该病例提示，SAVI可仅表现为婴儿期发生间质性肺病，无典型皮疹时易漏诊。

ILD.title: Simplified ultrasound scoring scale (LUNA score) for the detection of interstitial lung disease using point-of-care lung ultrasound in systemic autoimmune diseases.
ILD.authors: Fumanal Idocin L, Dieste Granena I, Lopez de Turiso Giner P, Fumanal Idocin J, Moreno Diaz J, Velilla Marco J
ILD.summary: LUNA评分系统通过肺部超声对B线和胸膜异常进行量化，可高效诊断系统性自身免疫病相关间质性肺病，准确率达96.8%。

ILD.title: Anticancer drug-induced interstitial lung disease: a critical appraisal of clinical practice guidelines and consensus statements.
ILD.authors: Zhang Y, Ma Z, Sun X, Zhang Y, Zhu M, Zhang S, Feng X, An Z
ILD.summary: 抗癌药物引发的间质性肺病临床指南质量参差不齐，患者参与度及类固醇方案推荐不一致。

ILD.title: Role of Radiographic Fibrosis Extent in Identifying Immunomodulatory Treatment Response in Hypersensitivity Pneumonitis.
ILD.authors: Muegge CN, Min B, Mrad A, Ianazzo E, Hamblin M, Pandya S, Lee G, Carroll M, Johannson KA, Matson SM
ILD.summary: HRCT显示纤维化范围≥10%的慢性过敏性肺炎患者接受免疫调节治疗后肺功能改善较差。

ILD.title: Clinical features, pathogenesis, and treatment of anti-MDA5 antibody-positive interstitial lung disease.
ILD.authors: Yamaguchi K
ILD.summary: 抗MDA5抗体阳性皮肌炎合并快速进展性间质性肺病预后差，三药联合治疗可改善结局。

ILD.title: Mechanisms of Surfactant Maturation in Development and Disease.
ILD.authors: Pranty AI, Cuevas Ocana S, Dickens JA
ILD.summary: 肺表面活性物质成熟障碍可导致从新生儿呼吸衰竭到成人间质性肺病等疾病。

ILD.title: Cutaneous manifestations in myositis syndromes.
ILD.authors: Schedler NC, Raheel O, de la Garza JAC, Edminister JR
ILD.summary: 肌炎综合征的特定皮疹类型与自身抗体、间质性肺病及恶性肿瘤风险密切相关。

ILD.title: Risk factors for immune checkpoint inhibitor-related interstitial lung disease: a retrospective cohort study.
ILD.authors: Amemiya T, Suzuki H
ILD.summary: ICI治疗前C反应蛋白和单核细胞升高是免疫检查点抑制剂相关间质性肺病的独立风险因素。

ILD.title: Methodological Considerations for Quantitative Computed Tomography-Based Prognosis in Fibrotic Interstitial Lung Disease.
ILD.journal: Am J Respir Crit Care Med
ILD.authors: Hong Y, Shu Z
ILD.summary: 摘要缺失。

ILD.title: Early risk response to vasodilators and outcomes in interstitial lung disease associated pulmonary hypertension.
ILD.authors: Teramachi R, Fukihara J, Ichihara S, Kataoka K, Takei R, Yamano Y, Watanabe F, Yokoyama T, Kimura T, Kondoh Y
ILD.summary: ILD-PH患者接受血管扩张剂治疗后，四层风险分层改善与更长的无移植生存期相关。
